status.label: Status
status.title: Get session status
status.description: Returns the current status of the session including signing progress, handout status, and document information.

checkstatus.label: Check Status
checkstatus.title: Check session status
checkstatus.description: Lightweight status check for a session. Returns the current signing state without full document details.

load.label: Load
load.title: Load / reactivate session
load.description: Reactivates a session so the owner can open it again via the accessURL (/index link). The access link is consumed on first use - after the owner opens the session, this endpoint must be called again to generate a fresh link. This is only needed while the session is not in external mode.

documents.label: Documents
documents.title: Get all documents metadata
documents.description: Retrieves complete metadata about all session documents including annotations, signatures, and form fields.

download.label: Download All
download.title: Download all documents
download.description: Downloads all session documents as a ZIP file (or PDF for single document). Includes signed versions with all signatures applied.

abort-extern.label: Abort External
abort-extern.title: Abort external mode
abort-extern.description: Returns the session from external state back to normal. All external signing links become invalid.

finish.label: Finish
finish.title: Finish session
finish.description: Marks the session as finished. Triggers final processing: emails, archiving, and cleanup according to session configuration.

restart.label: Restart
restart.title: Restart session
restart.description: Restarts a closed or finished session, allowing new signatures and modifications. Resets completion state.

delete.label: Reject
delete.title: Delete / reject session
delete.description: Aborts and deletes the session. All documents and signing data are removed. This action cannot be undone.

delete-session.label: Delete
delete-session.title: Delete session permanently
delete-session.description: Permanently deletes the session from the database. Unlike reject, this removes persisted sessions. Cannot be undone.

audit.label: Audit
audit.title: Get audit trail
audit.description: Returns the complete audit trail for the session: every action, timestamp, user, and IP address.

extern-users.label: Extern Users
extern-users.title: List external users
extern-users.description: Returns all external users and their signing status for this session.

send-reminder.label: Send Reminder
send-reminder.title: Send manual reminder
send-reminder.description: Manually sends a reminder notification (email/SMS) to all pending external signers of this session.

extern-info.label: Extern Info
extern-info.title: External signing info
extern-info.description: Returns additional status information about a session that is currently in external signing state, including per-user progress and link status.

sso.label: SSO Token
sso.title: Create SSO JWT token
sso.description: Creates a JWT token for a user to access the inSign start module (gallery/process manager). Body is a UserInfo object with at least id (the user identifier). Returns a plain-text JWT. Redirect user to /startmodule/?jwt=<token>.

usersessions.label: User Sessions
usersessions.title: List user sessions
usersessions.description: List sessions belonging to a user. You can pass multiple user IDs separated by a configurable separator.

version.label: Version
version.title: Get API version
version.description: Returns the current inSign application version.
